CustomField.description: The Type value assigned to the auto-created Relationship record. The reciprocal Relationship on the related Contact receives the corresponding reciprocal type from the Relationship Lookup table, if one exists.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The relationship type label (e.g., "Friend", "Employer") assigned when the relationship is created. The reciprocal contact receives the matching type.
CustomField.label: Relationship Type
